channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title:
RT @AYi_AInotes: 全网都在吹的LeCun新论文，90%的解读都是错的。
他们说生成式AI是死路，说过去三年花的几百亿全白费了，说15M参数的小模型就能吊打万亿大模型。
这些全是营销...
item.description:
RT @AYi_AInotes: 全网都在吹的LeCun新论文，90%的解读都是错的。
他们说生成式AI是死路，说过去三年花的几百亿全白费了，说15M参数的小模型就能吊打万亿大模型。
这些全是营销号的夸张， 我觉得这篇论文的真正分量比他们吹的还要重。
Yann LeCun…
--- @ylecun | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 105 | 💬 0 | 👁 0
item.author: @ylecun

item.title:

Yann LeCun 是当今 AI 领域最有影响力的科学家之一，深度学习三大教父之一，2018 年图灵奖获得者，
他直接怼了...
item.description:
RT @AYi_AInotes: 这可能是今年AI圈最清醒的一条推文，
Yann LeCun 是当今 AI 领域最有影响力的科学家之一，深度学习三大教父之一，2018 年图灵奖获得者，
他直接怼了Anthropic CEO Dario的著名言论，
Dario说未来一到五年…
--- @ylecun | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 133 | 💬 0 | 👁 0
item.author: @ylecun

item.title: RT @FuSheng_0306: 周末就试了几款AI“内容创作”工具——Youmind、Notebook LM、Perplexity，看看谁更胜一筹呢。 工具筛选的前提：能直接调取网上资源，特别是Y...
item.description:
RT @FuSheng_0306: 周末就试了几款AI“内容创作”工具——Youmind、Notebook LM、Perplexity，看看谁更胜一筹呢。 工具筛选的前提：能直接调取网上资源，特别是YouTube，可以对视频内容进行分析提炼。… https://t.co/3bO…
--- @lifesinger | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 5 | 💬 0 | 👁 0
item.author: @lifesinger

item.title: History shows us that these conflicts don’t happen independently. They emerge as interconnected part...
item.description:
History shows us that these conflicts don’t happen independently. They emerge as interconnected parts of a larger pattern — a Big Cycle involving power, economics, and shifting world orders. To understand what’s happening and the implications of the Iran war, you have to see the whole system instead of looking at just one event.
I break this down in my latest article, “The Big Thing: We Are in a World War That Isn’t Going to End Anytime Soon,” available to read here: https://t.co/OXoWz8Y3th
--- @RayDalio | ❤️ 70 | 🔁 11 | 💬 14 | 👁 12017
item.author: @RayDalio

item.title: RT @Dan_Jeffries1: It's always easy to see jobs that will go away but hard to see the jobs that will...
item.description:
RT @Dan_Jeffries1: It's always easy to see jobs that will go away but hard to see the jobs that will get created.
Try explaining "web dev…
--- @ylecun | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 10 | 💬 0 | 👁 0

item.title:

item.title:
My biggest takeaway from this conversation:
The funnel is not disappearing, but it is collapsing in...
item.description:
My biggest takeaway from this conversation:
The funnel is not disappearing, but it is collapsing into a single interaction.
Awareness, consideration, decision, all happening in one chat, in seconds.
That is a very different operating model for marketing, sales, and service.
Watch the full video to see how this shift is playing out in practice, and how Spoki is thinking about conversational experiences that turn messages into outcomes.
What would need to change in your business for a conversation to become your primary interface with customers?
--- @Ronald_vanLoon | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 88
item.author: @Ronald_vanLoon

item.title:
The real shift is this:
We are moving from one-way messaging to two-way, outcome-driven conversatio...
item.description:
The real shift is this:
We are moving from one-way messaging to two-way, outcome-driven conversations.
That means a customer should be able to:
→ ask a question → get a real answer → change an appointment → buy a product → solve the issue
All inside the same thread.
Not across 5 channels. Not after 3 handoffs. Not 2 days later.
--- @Ronald_vanLoon | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 90
item.author: @Ronald_vanLoon

item.title:
Most companies still treat customer messaging like a megaphone.
Send update. Push campaign. Wait.
...
item.description:
Most companies still treat customer messaging like a megaphone.
Send update. Push campaign. Wait.
But AI is changing the rules fast:
The future is not better messaging. It is conversations that actually get things done.
That is the big idea I unpacked with @GiorgioPagliara from @Spokiapp, and it has major implications for every team thinking about CX, sales, and automation.
Let’s dig in.
#SpokiPartner
--- @Ronald_vanLoon | ❤️ 1 | 🔁 0 | 💬 2 | 👁 126
item.author: @Ronald_vanLoon
